data.title: [tickets branch]: push after ticket close -> rebase conflict on tickets branch
data.description:
## Incident Overview

Observed during an interactive /dso:debug-everything session when closing ticket 0f1a-db93.

**Expected Behavior**
After transitioning a ticket to closed, the tickets branch push should succeed without conflict.

**Actual Behavior**
The .claude/scripts/dso ticket transition command emitted:
  Warning: tickets branch push failed (rebase conflict, attempt 1)
  Error: current status is 'closed', not 'in_progress'. Re-run: ticket transition 0f1a-db93 closed closed

The push failed with a rebase conflict. The ticket was already closed (likely by a concurrent operation or prior session), resulting in both a state mismatch error and a branch push failure.

## Logs
Occurred: 2026-04-20 during worktree-20260420-115624 session
Command: .claude/scripts/dso ticket transition 0f1a-db93 in_progress closed
Ticket: 0f1a-db93 (already closed before command ran)
Error: tickets branch push failed (rebase conflict, attempt 1)
